# 3rdparty/imgui CMakeLists.txt
set(TARGET_NAME imgui)

add_library(
    ${TARGET_NAME} STATIC
    imgui.h
    imgui_internal.h
    imconfig.h
    imstb_rectpack.h
    imstb_textedit.h
    imstb_truetype.h
    imgui_impl_glfw.h
    imgui_impl_vulkan.h
    imgui.cpp
    imgui_demo.cpp
    imgui_draw.cpp
    imgui_widgets.cpp
    imgui_tables.cpp
    imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
    imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp)
add_dependencies(${TARGET_NAME} glfw)
add_dependencies(${TARGET_NAME} vulkan)

target_link_libraries(
    ${TARGET_NAME} PUBLIC
    glfw
    vulkan
)

target_include_directories(
    ${TARGET_NAME} PUBLIC
    $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}>
)
